title: Consultation on proposed fees for veterinary drugs master files - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on proposed fees for veterinary drugs master files

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from June 2, 2023, to August 12, 2023. The purpose of this consultation was to obtain feedback on proposed fees for veterinary drugs master files (MF).
We appreciate you taking the time to be part of this consultation.

## Who was the focus of this consultation
We sought feedback from:
- stakeholders of veterinary drugs master files
We will seek your consent to publish your feedback. If you wish, you may choose to have your feedback published anonymously.
We are looking for stakeholder views on:
- proposed fee structure and fee amounts for veterinary drugs
The fee proposal was subject to a 70-day consultation period. The feedback received will be considered and incorporated where appropriate ahead of finalizing a fee order, which will be published in Canada Gazette, Part II.
We appreciate the feedback received on this proposal.
- Veterinary drugs master files fees and updates: Notice
Resource Management Operations Directorate Health Products and Food Branch Health Canada Main Building, 150 Tunney's Pasture Driveway Ottawa ON K1A 0K9 Email: CRO-BRC@hc-sc.gc.ca
